title: [Crash] System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.
author: robertpopa22
body_snippet:

comments.author: meyergru
comments.snippet:
I would love to try that out because of the screen update bug in the official release, however, your last release is not self-contained and the one before that is causes this crash.

When I copy the last release over my normal installation, it does not start at all and when I copy it over the last self-contained one, it causes an endless loop asking me to install .NET 10, which I have installed (and rebooted).
